scope: generated-build first-wave runtime proof only; no API/UI, no deploy/release, no cloud-dev, no Java/.NET

implementation_commit.subject: feat(generated-build): add local runtime-proof for first-wave families
implementation_commit.remote_push_status: not attempted/succeeded because GITHUB_TOKEN/GIT_TOKEN are missing in this shell

runtime_proof_primitive.failure_behavior: returns the input artifact unchanged; no runtime_proof is emitted
runtime_proof_primitive.docker_behavior: docker run -d --rm -p 127.0.0.1:<ephemeral>:<inferred_port> <image>; poll loopback TCP; docker rm -f cleanup

exit_codes.3: build_proven remained build_proven because liveness was not observed

template_adjustments.python: python template now installs requirements.txt when present before copying app files; needed for truthful FastAPI/Uvicorn runtime proof
template_adjustments.node: unchanged first-wave template; package*.json install then copy app
template_adjustments.go: unchanged first-wave template; multi-stage go build into distroless/static

new_runtime_proof_tests: runtime proof success path advances to runtime_proven
runtime proof failure keeps build_proven and emits no runtime_proof
runtime proof on proposed artifact does not overclaim
CLI returns exit code 3 when liveness is not observed

next_slice.summary: Persist generated-build artifacts under a canonical local `.amof/generated-builds/index.json` and add read-only listing/lookup CLI commands. No API/UI, no deploy/release, no cloud-dev.
